<?php namespace Hamcrest\Text; /* Copyright (c) 2010 hamcrest.org */ /** * Tests if the argument is a string that matches a regular expression. */ class MatchesPattern extends SubstringMatcher { public function __construct($pattern) { parent::__construct($pattern); } /** * Matches if value is a string that matches regular expression $pattern. * * @factory */ public static function matchesPattern($pattern) { return new self($pattern); } // -- Protected Methods protected function evalSubstringOf($item) { return preg_match($this->_substring, (string) $item) >= 1; } protected function relationship() { return 'matching'; } }
